features.title: Example Feature — replace with your first real feature
features.user_visible_behavior: Describe what the user sees or experiences when this feature works correctly.
verification: Manual: navigate to the feature and confirm expected behavior
features.notes: RULES: (1) Only one feature may be 'in_progress' at a time unless parallel_safe is true. (2) A feature cannot be set to 'passing' without evidence — evidence must reference test output, screenshots, GIFs, videos, or logs. (3) Link github_issue to the issue number once created. (4) Set parallel_safe to true only after a formal parallelization assessment.

features.notes: This feature depends on example-feature-01 completing first (see dependencies). Parallel work is blocked until the dependency is 'passing' with evidence. Replace all placeholder values with real feature data during the initialization workflow.
